description: Use this API to convert a PSAS Command File into a PSSE Response File. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr, respfil = psas(inpfile, outfile)

parameters.name: inpfile
parameters.description: Name of the psas command file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: outfile
parameters.description: Name of response file; blank to have psas assign the filename. (input; blank by default).

return_values.name: respfil
return_values.description: Pathname of the response file constructed by psas. (output).

error_codes.description: errors detected while reading the PSAS command data input file.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
